name: app-template
description: Template repository for the Rhymion App Generator. Edit prj/, then deploy.

scripts.setup: git submodule update --init --recursive && bash scripts/sync-prj.sh && npm --prefix app-generator install && npm --prefix app-generator run docker:test:up && npm --prefix app-generator exec -- prisma db push && npm --prefix app-generator exec -- prisma generate
scripts.dev: bash scripts/sync-prj.sh && npm --prefix app-generator run dev:test
scripts.build: bash scripts/sync-prj.sh && npm --prefix app-generator run build:all
